optionA.text: Composite neurosetae with long, slender, articulated appendages

optionB.text: Composite neurosetae short, smooth unidentate falcigers

optionA.text: Lateral antennae on the prostomium proper; all antennae with short ceratophores or short and inconspicuous

optionB.text: Lateral antennae fused to first setiger; median antenna with large median ceratophore

optionA.text: Dorsal cirri absent on setiger 3; elytrae not sand-incrusted

optionB.text: Dorsal cirri present on setiger 3; elytrae sand-incrusted

optionA.text: Neurosetae composite spinigers with short, canaliculated appendages

optionB.text: Neurosetae composite, unidentate falcigers with marginally serrated appendages

optionA.text: Elytrae small, leaving the middle of the dorsum uncovered; neurosetae with short bidentate appendages

optionB.text: Elytrae covering the dorsum, neurosetae with uni- or bidentate appendages of varying lengths

optionA.text: Auricles large, auricles also present on the tentacular segment

optionB.text: Auricles small, absent from tentacular segment

optionA.text: All neurosetae composite unidentate falcigers with relatively short, straight appendages
Ventral cirri covered medially by long papillae
Parapodial lobes and stylodes covered with fine fimbriae
At least some neuropodial falcigers present
